name: Personal Website
desc: A personal website built with React + Vite + TypeScript + Supabase, documenting life, reading, projects, and dreams.

name: Super Mario
desc: A recreation of the original 1985 Super Mario, built in C++ using OOP techniques.

name: ABSA Pipeline — CodePulse User Feedback Sentiment Analysis
desc: Extracts sentiment quadruplets from user feedback using both an Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis pipeline and an LLM, compares their performance, and visualizes the results as word clouds.

name: CodePulse — Data Structures & Algorithms Visualization Learning Platform
desc: A capstone project combining interactive visualization, code execution tracing, and AI-based algorithm recognition into a data-structures-and-algorithms teaching platform.
